description: Add tests for the new Motion components and verify the 4 new frontend apps (Calendar, Docs, Drive, Meet) can import and use the animation primitives without breaking their typecheck/build. Add a simple usage of FadeIn/StaggerList/PageTransition in each app's main layout or key screen component.
steps: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/motion-components.test.tsx with tests for all Motion primitives: FadeIn renders children, StaggerList renders children, PageTransition renders children, SpringButton renders and handles clicks, AnimatedSkeleton renders with correct role, SlidePanel renders when open/hidden when closed, ScaleOnHover renders children, MotionConfig provides context values. Use @testing-library/react and mock framer-motion appropriately for jsdom.

In apps/quantcalendar/src/app/ - find the root layout or page component and wrap the main content area with PageTransition from @quant/shared-ui. If there is a list view (CalendarGrid or AgendaView), wrap items with StaggerList.
In apps/quantdocs/src/app/ - find the root layout or page component and wrap the main content area with PageTransition. Wrap DocList items with StaggerList.
In apps/quantdrive/src/app/ - find the root layout or page component and wrap the main content area with PageTransition. Wrap FileBrowser items with StaggerList.
In apps/quantmeet/src/app/ - find the root layout or page component and wrap the main content area with PageTransition.
Run pnpm typecheck to confirm all 111 packages pass
Run pnpm build to confirm all 88 packages pass
Run pnpm test --filter=@quant/shared-ui to confirm motion tests pass
acceptance_criteria: All 4 frontend apps import at least one Motion component from @quant/shared-ui
